calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the Declaration by Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: American Shipper, LLC and Syed Nazem Shirazi as follows:
Principal $41,543.51
Prejudgment Interest $1,456.64
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $435.00, for a total of $45,935.15
Plaintiff is entitled to the immediate possession of the leased equipments listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
